div.p:
You are editing your billing and shipping addresses at the same time!
If you want to modify your shipping address, create a new address.

t.t-value: country and [x for x in country.get_address_fields() if x in ["zip", "city"]] or ["city", "zip"]

div.t-att-style: (not country or not country.state_ids) and 'display: none'
div.label: State / Province

option.t-att-selected: s.id == ('state_id' in checkout and country and checkout['state_id'] != '' and int(checkout['state_id']))

div.label: Ship to the same address  (Your shipping address will be requested later)

a.class: btn btn-primary mb32 a-submit a-submit-disable a-submit-loading

xpath.attribute: 'display: none!important' if not deliveries and delivery_has_storable else ''

div.class: btn-group btn-group-toggle mt-2 ml-md-2 d-sm-inline-flex o_wsale_apply_layout

label.t-attf-class: btn btn-secondary #{'active' if layout_mode != 'list' else None} fa fa-th-large o_wsale_apply_grid
label.title: Grid

label.t-attf-class: btn btn-secondary #{'active' if layout_mode == 'list' else None} fa fa-th-list o_wsale_apply_list
label.title: List

t.t: Drag building blocks here to customize the header for "" category.

div.p: Click 'New' in the top-right corner to create your first product.

input.name: brand
input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if brand.id in product_brand_set else None

a.class: btn btn-primary btn-lg mt16 js_check_product a-submit d-block d-sm-inline-block

div.p: This product is no longer available.
This product has no valid combination.

p.placeholder: A short description that will also appear on documents.

hr.t-if: sum([(1 if len(l.value_ids)==1 else 0) for l in product.attribute_line_ids])

a.class: btn btn-primary btn-lg mt16 d-block d-sm-inline-block

template.name: MCCOY Website Inherit Product Compare Row
MCCOY Website Inherit Contact US Form

div.p: Subscribe to find out all the latest updates.

button.style: font-weight: bold;font-weight: bold;border: 3px solid white;border-left: unset;border-radius: unset;height: 43px;color:white; background: #0069a5 !important;

template.name: MCCOY Website Inherit Cart Products Item

input.t-att-value: int(line.product_uom_qty) == line.product_uom_qty and int(line.product_uom_qty) or line.product_uom_qty
input.name: add_qty

div.t-esc: int(line.product_uom_qty) == line.product_uom_qty and int(line.product_uom_qty) or line.product_uom_qty

t.t-if: not search or c.id in search_categories_ids

template.name: MCCOY Website Inherit Collapse Category Recursive

t.t-value: not search and c.child_id or c.child_id.filtered(lambda c: c.id in search_categories_ids)

a.t-attf-class: dropdown nav-link #{'active' if c.id == category.id else ''}

ul.class: nav nav-pills flex-column nav-hierarchy dropdown-content menu_vertical_subvertical

t.t-value: not search and c.child_id or c.child_id.filtered(lambda c: c.id in search_categories_ids)

a.t-attf-class: dropdown nav-link #{'active' if c.id == category.id else ''}

div.t-attf-class: text-danger oe_default_price oe_striked_price {{'' if combination_info['has_discounted_price'] else 'd-none'}}

template.name: MCCOY Website Inherit Optional Products Cart

button.class: btn btn-primary float_left js_add_cart_json d-none d-md-inline-block
button.title: Remove one

button.class: btn btn-primary float_left js_add_cart_json d-none d-md-inline-block
button.title: Add one

div.t-attf-class: text-danger oe_default_price oe_optional oe_striked_price {{'' if combination_info['has_discounted_price'] else 'd-none'}}

table.class: table table-bordered table-striped table-hover text-center mt16 table-comparator

template.name: MCCOY Website Inherit Comparison Product Compare

div.p: We will contact you soon for the shipping cost.
